creator: ssw01@mathistry.net
text:
After moving the poudriere build tree to UFS, 140 ports were built (along with the extraction of over 1500 prerequisite packages) without a hiccup.

Closing this because it's clearly not a ports issue and is not a useful test case for whatever the real issue is.

If I can figure out how to reliably trigger this on the VPS in a way that provides useful information, I'll resubmit accordingly.
